text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell was spawned by WmiPrvSE.exe with a hidden window (-w 1) and an obfuscated, encoded command (-enc). This is a common technique used by attackers to execute malicious scripts discreetly. The subsequent extensive creation of registry keys related to SystemCertificates and EnterpriseCertificates, including 'Disallowed' stores, could indicate an attempt to manipulate certificate trust settings.",
  "indicators": [
    "WmiPrvSE.exe parent",
    "powershell -enc",
    "powershell -w 1",
    "hidden window",
    "encoded command",
    "certificate store modification",
    "temp file write"
  ]
}
